file_changes: feat(dualscreen): implement heartbeat signals, safe areas, laser pointer, stage mode, and animated projector standby

- Setup bidirectional connection heartbeat via BroadcastChannel: projector periodically sends pings, trainer monitors pings and shows a virtual red pulsating LED ('NO AR') and stage controls only when active.
- Added a Digital Laser Pointer overlay: mouse moves over #display-area on trainer window transmit relative coordinates, rendering a smooth glowing red neon dot on the projector window.

- Implemented Stage & Push narrative controls: trainer can toggle 'Stage Mode' to prepare changes privately (blocking automatic state and drawing broadcasts), and push them all at once using the 'Publish' button (syncing state and redrawing canvas via data URL).
- Added a 16:9 Safe Area Guide outline overlay toggled via drop-down menu to assist framing.
- Added an Animated Standby screensaver on the projector: floats the active brand logo and pulses waiting messages when display area is empty.
- Updated conductor track files (tracks.md, metadata.json, plan.md) to mark track completed.
